sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n28109" key="doruke/nteira" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δορῠκέντειρα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n28109.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">piercing with the spear,</tr_> <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.l. in</abbr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0654.tlg002:20" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Corn.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">ND</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">20</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
